---
title: "downloading HADISST SST data"
author: "Sarah Willington"
date: "2025-09-19"
output: html_document
---


# hadisst_subset.R

Download HadISST monthly SST from met office, subset by lon/lat/years


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{r libraries}

library(ncdf4)        # For handling netCDF files    
library(lubridate)    # For date manipulation
library(rerddap)
library(tidyverse)    # For data manipulation and plotting
library(here)

library(terra)
library(R.utils)
```

```{r set directories}
# Set directories
project_dir <- here::here()
output_dir <- file.path(project_dir, "0_data", "01_raw_data")
```


```{r view HadISST meta data}

# get dataset info object
info_hadisst <- info("erdHadISST")

# see coordinate metadata
info_hadisst$alldata$latitude
info_hadisst$alldata$longitude

```

```{r download directly from met office and subset}


# ---- Read site bbox table ----
latlon_path <- file.path(project_dir, "0_data", "01_raw_data", "oto_sites_HadISST.csv")
latlon <- read_csv(latlon_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

get_lat_range <- function(sitename, tbl = latlon) {
  r <- tbl %>% filter(site == sitename) %>% slice(1)
  if (nrow(r) == 0) stop("Site not found: ", sitename)
  c(r$latmin, r$latmax)
}

get_lon_range <- function(sitename, tbl = latlon) {
  r <- tbl %>% filter(site == sitename) %>% slice(1)
  if (nrow(r) == 0) stop("Site not found: ", sitename)
  c(r$lonmin, r$lonmax)
}

# ---- Download HadISST SST to temp, unzip to temp, open as SpatRaster ----
download_hadisst_sst_temp <- function() {
  url <- "https://www.metoffice.gov.uk/hadobs/hadisst/data/HadISST_sst.nc.gz"

  stamp   <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
  gz_path <- file.path(tempdir(), paste0("HadISST_sst_", stamp, ".nc.gz"))
  nc_path <- sub("\\.gz$", "", gz_path)

  message("Downloading: ", gz_path)
  download.file(url, gz_path, mode = "wb", quiet = FALSE)

  message("Unzipping: ", nc_path)
  R.utils::gunzip(gz_path, destname = nc_path, overwrite = TRUE, remove = FALSE)

  sst <- terra::rast(nc_path, subds = "sst")

  # Ensure time exists (HadISST monthly from 1870; using mid-month convention)
  tm <- terra::time(sst)
  if (is.null(tm) || all(is.na(tm))) {
    tm <- seq(as.Date("1870-01-16"), by = "month", length.out = nlyr(sst))
    terra::time(sst) <- tm
  }

  list(sst = sst, nc_path = nc_path, gz_path = gz_path)
}

# ---- Longitude convention helper (if dataset is 0..360, convert negative lons) ----
coerce_lon_to_dataset <- function(lon_range, sst) {
  xr <- terra::ext(sst)
  ds_lon_min <- xr[1]
  ds_lon_max <- xr[2]

  # If dataset looks like 0..360
  if (ds_lon_min >= 0 && ds_lon_max > 180) {
    return(ifelse(lon_range < 0, lon_range + 360, lon_range))
  }
  lon_range
}

# ---- Subset one site to monthly spatial mean SST ----
subset_site_monthly_mean <- function(sst, sitename, lat_range, lon_range, years) {
  # validation
  stopifnot(length(lat_range) == 2, length(lon_range) == 2)
  if (any(!is.finite(lat_range)) || any(!is.finite(lon_range))) {
    stop("Non-finite lat/lon bounds for site: ", sitename)
  }

  lat_range <- sort(lat_range)
  lon_range <- sort(lon_range)

  lon_range2 <- coerce_lon_to_dataset(lon_range, sst)

  e <- terra::ext(lon_range2[1], lon_range2[2], lat_range[1], lat_range[2])
  sst_crop <- terra::crop(sst, e)

  # time subset
  tm <- as.Date(terra::time(sst_crop))
  keep <- tm >= as.Date(sprintf("%d-01-01", min(years))) &
          tm <= as.Date(sprintf("%d-12-31", max(years)))

  sst_crop <- sst_crop[[which(keep)]]
  tm_keep  <- as.Date(terra::time(sst_crop))

  # spatial mean for each monthly layer
  sst_mean <- terra::global(sst_crop, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)[, 1]

  tibble(
    site     = sitename,
    date     = tm_keep,
    year     = lubridate::year(date),
    month    = lubridate::month(date),
    sst_mean = as.numeric(sst_mean)
  )
}

# ---- Main wrapper: download once, subset N sites, save only subsets, delete big files ----
get_hadisst_for_sites <- function(
  sites,
  years,
  out_dir = file.path(project_dir, "0_data", "HadISST_subsets")
) {
  dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  tmp <- download_hadisst_sst_temp()
  on.exit({
    if (file.exists(tmp$nc_path)) file.remove(tmp$nc_path)
    if (file.exists(tmp$gz_path)) file.remove(tmp$gz_path)
  }, add = TRUE)

  sst <- tmp$sst

  out_list <- lapply(sites, function(s) {
    lat_range <- get_lat_range(s)
    lon_range <- get_lon_range(s)

    message("Subsetting ", s,
            " | lat: ", paste(lat_range, collapse = ", "),
            " | lon: ", paste(lon_range, collapse = ", "),
            " | years: ", paste(range(years), collapse = "-"))

    df <- subset_site_monthly_mean(sst, s, lat_range, lon_range, years)

    out_file <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("HadISST_sst_mean_", s, "_", min(years), "-", max(years), ".csv"))
    readr::write_csv(df, out_file)

    df
  })

  bind_rows(out_list)
}

# ============================
# usage
# ============================
years <- 1900:2025

# one site
vic_df <- get_hadisst_for_sites("VIC", years)

# all sites in latlon csv
all_df <- get_hadisst_for_sites(sort(unique(latlon$site)), years)

write_csv(all_df, file = file.path(output_dir,paste("HadISST_all_sites_monthly_mean.csv" )))
```
